description: Legal document. Hand of Natan b. Shemuel? Location: Fustat. Involves [Abū l-]Karam(?) known as Ibn al-Shavuy and [...] b. ʿAdiyya ha-Zaqen and a debt of 3.5 dinars. Dating: Mentions the start of some period in Heshvan 1459 Seleucid, which is 1147/1148 CE.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
